Then, I go to option B, the server. Again, the text is silent on any prior struggles. There's no reason to connect the dots in this scenario, as smart people of all types may choose to serve others in different ways and for different reasons.

Option C, then, is the last one. *Cannot be determined.* This is clearly the correct answer. The text focuses on their *current* professions and their reminiscing.
